nasb.text: Jesus answered and said to him, “What I do you do not realize now, but you will understand hereafter.”

esv.text: Jesus answered him, “What I am doing you do not understand now, but afterward you will understand.”

cnv.text: 耶穌回答：“我所作的，你現在不知道，以後就會明白。”

ccb.text: 耶稣回答说：“我这样做，你现在虽然不明白，将来一定会明白。”

csbs.text: 耶稣回答说：“我所做的，你现在不理解，不过事后就会明白。”
